source_pr.title: executor: accelerate TestSortInDisk
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: #24130 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

1. using batch insert instead of insert one by one

Before:
```
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f  TestSortInDisk
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        8.816s
```

After
```
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f TestSortInDisk
ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        6.604s
```

### Related changes



### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f TestSortInDisk.
